q_quant_rationale: The analysis explicitly compares campaign AOV to non-campaign AOV as baseline, quantifies the deviation as ~23.2% lower, and the direction (campaign < non-campaign) matches the data.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports the AOV values (12,616.93 vs 9,693.25 JPY) and sample sizes (1,834 vs 484), and provides a verdict that the data supports the hypothesis.
